name: filerecovery
description: Recover deleted and lost files from disk images and devices with an AI agent: signature-based carving, filesystem-aware undelete (FAT/exFAT/NTFS/ext/HFS+), bad-sector-tolerant imaging, and volume triage — via the filerecovery MCP server. Includes a skill for authoring custom carvers. Requires the `filerecovery` binary on PATH.
